problem id: b5261a95
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00011000 -> 01101100
  00000101 -> 00010110
  00010111 -> 01010111
  01111010 -> 11010101
  00110111 -> 11000111
  11111111 -> 10000011
  11010111 -> 00110111
  00001011 -> 00101001
  11101010 -> 11011101
  01010110 -> 01110011

query: 10000111
predicted answer: 01011111
